expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text: Sent an email to 'oncall@acme.io' with subject 'Top error' and body: "Sentry issue OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events has the highest event count (4665)." Confirmation: 1 email sent.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(insert! :emails {:to_addr \"oncall@acme.io\", :subject \"Top error\", :body \"Sentry issue OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events has the highest event count (4665).\"})"}

text: Sent an email to 'oncall@acme.io' with subject 'Top error' and body: "Sentry issue OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events has the highest event count (4665)." Confirmation: 1 email sent.
